revision.text: {{strong|style=color:red;}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: code fix & improvement (not bothering to doc the extra fields, but no reason to disable them, esp. if someone changes a {{strong}} to a {{strongbad}}
revision.text: {{strong|1={{{1}}}|style=color:red;{{#if:{{{style}}}|{{{style}}}}} |class={{{class|}}} |id={{{id|}}} |lang={{{lang|}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected Template:Strongbad: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: Used in [[Template:collapse top]] ([edit=sysop] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{strong|1={{{1}}}|style=color:red;{{#if:{{{style}}}|{{{style}}}}} |class={{{class|}}} |id={{{id|}}} |lang={{{lang|}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Changed protection level of Template:Strongbad: Lower protection to allow SMcCandlish to finish working on it. Please have it reprotected when done. ([edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) [move=sysop] (indefinite))
revision.text: {{strong|1={{{1}}}|style=color:red;{{#if:{{{style}}}|{{{style}}}}} |class={{{class|}}} |id={{{id|}}} |lang={{{lang|}}} }}<noinclude> {{documentation}} <!-- Add cats and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: installing title= feature (can be useful); removing lang= feature (should be done with language templates instead.

revision.comment: make sure "{{{style}}}" is not passed to {{strong}} per request by 184.254.188.63; use {{main other}}
revision.text: {{main other|{{FormattingError|Template:Strongbad is only for use in template documentation, guidelines and other Wikipedia-internal purposes. revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
